summary: Preview Report page testing completed successfully. All 6 test cases passed - login works, INTERNAL PREVIEW banner visible, Inspection Details section displays 11 Q&A categories with proper card format, OBD-2 Diagnostics section shows 'No Diagnostic Errors' with green checkmark.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview Report page at /preview-report/:id is fully functional. The transformCategoriesToReportFormat() and transformObdToReportFormat() functions correctly transform live-progress API data into the format expected by InspectionDetailsSection and OBDReportMobile components.

test_cases.evidence: Successfully logged in and redirected to ad-analytics page
Page loaded successfully with vehicle data (CELERIO VXI, Maruti Suzuki, 2014)

test_cases.test: 3. INTERNAL PREVIEW banner visible at top
test_cases.evidence: Amber banner with '🔒 INTERNAL PREVIEW - This is how the report will appear to customers' and 'Back to CRM' button visible

test_cases.test: 4. Inspection Details section displays Q&A categories
test_cases.evidence: Section shows '53+ Checkpoints' and '11 Categories' with expandable category cards containing Q&A items
Shows '0 Errors' badge, green checkmark icon, 'No Diagnostic Errors' message, and 'All systems functioning normally' text

All 11 categories found: General Information, Engine Health and Diagnosis, Exterior Inspection, Interior Inspection, Transmission System Diagnosis, Air Condition System Check, Battery Health Checkup, Headlights and Indictor Inspection, Infotainment/Electrical System and Accessories Check, Suspension & Brakes Inspection, Tires and Tools Inspection

categories_verified.name: Infotainment, Electrical System and Accessories Check
